jakob_traits.crypto_habits: Holds small amounts of various altcoins from old trades and airdrops. Typically deposits with Litecoin or Tron for low fees. Keeps gambling funds separate from main crypto portfolio.
jakob_traits.gaming_style: Gravitates toward Pragmatic Play and BGaming slots. Appreciates provably fair games as a trust signal even if he mostly plays regular slots. Browses by provider first, then by category.
jakob_traits.bankroll_management: Always sets a deposit limit right after signing up. Prefers self-managed tools over contacting support. Tests with a small deposit first before committing larger amounts.
jakob_traits.general_habits: Tests VPN access when reviewing from different locations. Values quick anonymous signups. Always checks T&Cs for withdrawal timeframes before depositing.

General.instruction: In the standout question answer, add one sentence about what personally stood out to you about this casino based on the features in the data. Ground it in a specific feature or detail from the casino data.

In the VPN answer, briefly mention you tested VPN access from different locations and share how it went -- ground this in the specific T&C stance and restricted countries data provided. One sentence max.

In the anonymity answer, mention you appreciated the quick anonymous signup -- you prefer not handing over personal details before even testing a casino. Reference the specific registration requirement from the data. One sentence.
In the legitimacy answer, mention you always check T&Cs before depositing and share your impression of this casino's transparency based on the age and reputation data provided. One sentence.

In the most natural answer for this section, mention that you started with a small test deposit when trying this casino, as you always do with new sites. Weave it into an existing answer naturally. One sentence.
Share your first impression of the site's look and feel when you first opened it. Ground it in the UX data provided (pop-ups, broken elements, modern design). One sentence in the UX answer.

Payments.instruction: In the altcoin answer, mention you used the buy-crypto feature when your wallet ran dry -- convenient despite fees, since you keep your gambling funds separate from your main crypto portfolio. One sentence.

In the altcoin answer, share that you tested the crypto swap feature -- you deposited with one coin and could withdraw in another, which suited your habit of holding various small token amounts from old trades. One sentence.
In the altcoin answer, mention you typically deposit with Litecoin or Tron for the low fees, and whether this casino supports those. Reference the specific crypto count from the data. One sentence.

In the withdrawal time answer, add a personal note about your withdrawal experience -- whether the stated timeframe felt reasonable for someone who always checks T&Cs before depositing. Reference the specific timeframe from the data. One sentence.

In the limits answer, mention whether the withdrawal limits felt comfortable for your typical session sizes as someone who tests with smaller deposits first. Reference the specific limit numbers from the data. One sentence.

In the altcoin answer, mention you hold small amounts of random altcoins from old trades and airdrops, and that having broad token support means you can actually put those to use instead of letting them sit in a wallet. One sentence.
